title: A Sample Paper for Chunker Testing

sections.abstract: This paper studies a toy problem for testing purposes only.
sections.introduction: Prior work has not addressed this toy problem in depth. We do.
sections.method: We propose a simple method consisting of two steps: (1) do a thing, (2) measure it.
sections.experiments:
We evaluate on a synthetic dataset with 100 examples. See Table 1 for results.

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Accuracy | 0.91 |
| F1 | 0.88 |
sections.results: Our method outperforms the baseline by 3 points on average.
sections.related_work: Related work includes prior toy-problem studies from the literature.
sections.conclusion: We conclude that the toy method works on the toy problem.
